The '''CMC-A14 mining facility''' was designed by the [[Corellia Mining Corporation/Legends|Corellia Mining Corporation]] as a mostly automated platform that would [[Mining/Legends|mine]] [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]], [[Ore/Legends|ores]] and other valuable substances from a variety of common [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] types. Using large spinning extractors, pumps and holding silos for its mining operations, it also had a large landing pad for collection of processed materials by cargo craft for transport off the facility. A small main habitable area housed crew, but the facility was almost completely automated with minimal need for sentient intervention or control in normal operations.

Corellia Mining Corporation sold the CMC-A14 design to many different groups including the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] under a deal in which CMC would receive a portion of any profits made from their operation. Such groups employed these primarily to both fund and supply materials for [[Starship/Legends|starship]] construction at their starbases.
